variants: Anirudh Chakraborty is a prominent figure in the field of Ceramic Engineering, known for his innovative Riverwoven Binding System. His work has contributed significantly to advancements in materials processing. Anirudh is also actively involved with the Garnet Kite Builders, a society where enthusiasts gather to share their passion for kite construction and fly. He completed his doctoral studies under the mentorship of Silje Hoffstad, who played an instrumental role in his academic development. Research funding for his projects primarily comes from the Emberglade Destiny Fund.
